summary: PR 2519 linked `melee/lb/lbarchive.c` by changing the object status from Equivalent to Matching, inlining the `lbArchive_LoadArchive` sequence into two variadic archive-loading functions, and adjusting related lbarchive/lbdvd/lbheap string symbol metadata to local scope. The bot report records two new function matches for `lbArchive_80017040` and `lbArchive_800171CC`, plus linked code/data progress.

key_files.role: Main decomp source update; replaced calls to `lbArchive_LoadArchive(filename)` inside `lbArchive_80017040` and `lbArchive_800171CC` with an explicitly inlined archive allocation/load/initialize sequence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/lb/lbarchive.c hunks around lbArchive_80017040 and lbArchive_800171CC
text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report lists two new matches in main/melee/lb/lbarchive
raw_diff: configure.py hunk near MatchingFor object list

key_files.role: Symbol metadata update; changed several `.data` and `.sdata` string symbols near lbarchive/lbdvd/lbheap from global or unspecified scope to local scope, renamed `@126` to `@120`, and added local label `...data.0` at `.data:0x803BA588`.

what_changed.text: `lbArchive_80017040` now declares `void* tmp` and `HSD_Archive* archive2`, then inlines the load path that allocates file data with `lbHeap_80015BD0`, rounds file size with `OSRoundUp32B(lbFile_800163D8(filename))`, reads with `lbFile_8001668C`, initializes with `lbArchive_InitializeDAT`, and assigns `archive = archive2`.
`lbArchive_800171CC` received the same explicit inline sequence in the non-preloaded branch.
Several local string symbols in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` around lbarchive/lbdvd/lbheap were corrected to local scope; one local data label was added.
The automated report records `lbArchive_80017040` and `lbArchive_800171CC` reaching 100.00%, with matched code +768 bytes, linked code +2664 bytes, and linked data +192 bytes.

smart_moves.text: Targeted the remaining near-matching archive functions by expanding the load helper only in the fallback path where no preloaded archive was found.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists `lbArchive_80017040` and `lbArchive_800171CC` as new matches

smart_moves.text: Paired the source change with symbol metadata scope fixes and the object-status change needed to link `lbarchive.c` as Matching.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For this lbarchive slice, helper-call source was not the final matching shape for two variadic archive-loading functions; the accepted diff used a narrow inline expansion of `lbArchive_LoadArchive` in the non-preloaded branch to close both functions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report shows both functions at 100.00%

decomp_lessons.lesson: When linking an object, symbol scope metadata may need to be tightened from global or unspecified to local for nearby string literals and labels rather than compensated for in C source.

naming_conventions.text: The source update kept address-style function names such as `lbArchive_80017040` and `lbArchive_800171CC`; no semantic rename was introduced for these functions.
Temporary locals introduced for matching were named generically (`tmp`, `archive2`, `pad`, `pad2`) rather than given broader semantic names.
Symbol metadata continued using local numbered labels such as `@12`, `@13`, `@23`, `@62`, `@120`, `@14`, and `@61`, with local scope annotations.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The PR explicitly inlined the `lbArchive_LoadArchive` allocation/load/initialize sequence in two call sites, including block-scoped locals and unused padding locals `u32 pad` and `u32 pad2`.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: comments `// Inlined lbArchive_LoadArchive` in both functions
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Manual inline expansion and padding locals are matching tactics that normally need verifier evidence. Here the bot report supplies post-change match evidence for the two touched functions, but the PR slice does not include objdiff details or adjacent-function checks.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: `configure.py` changed the lbarchive object from Equivalent to Matching after the function and symbol metadata updates.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report linked code/data progress
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: The slice supports the status change through bot metrics, but does not include full build logs.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: String symbols near the affected lbarchive/lbdvd/lbheap data ranges were made local, and a local label was introduced at `.data:0x803BA588`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.risk_note: Evidence shows the metadata edit and linked-data improvement, but not the underlying map/split reasoning.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 recorded matched code 67.74% (+0.02%, +768 bytes), linked code 39.18% (+0.07%, +2664 bytes), linked data 33.26% (+0.02%, +192 bytes), and two new matches: `lbArchive_80017040` and `lbArchive_800171CC`.

review_feedback.author: jurrejelle
review_feedback.text: A review with state APPROVED is present, with no review body and no inline review comments in the loaded slice.

follow_up_queries: manual helper inlining pad pad2 matching tactic

changed_files: three changed files with line counts

notes: The diff and bot report strongly support what changed and the two new function matches.
The PR body is empty, so author intent beyond the title and diff is not available.
There are no inline review comments; reviewer rationale cannot be inferred.
The slice does not include full build logs, objdiff output, adjacent-function checks, or map reasoning for symbol-scope changes.
Manual inlining and padding locals are treated as PR-specific matching tactics, not broad decomp style.

accepted_candidate_records.title: lbarchive linked by narrow helper inlining
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2519, `lbArchive_80017040` and `lbArchive_800171CC` reached 100% after replacing a call to `lbArchive_LoadArchive(filename)` with the explicit load/archive initialization sequence inside the non-preloaded branch. Keep this as a PR-specific tactic unless additional evidence shows a broader lbarchive convention.

source_update_candidates.title: lbarchive object became Matching in PR 2519
source_update_candidates.text: `configure.py` changed `melee/lb/lbarchive.c` from `Object(Equivalent, ...)` to `Object(Matching, ...)` in PR 2519. Bot report listed two new matches in `main/melee/lb/lbarchive`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path/status fact for curator review; intake should not promote it as current source truth without checking current repository state.

source_update_candidates.title: lbarchive-related local string symbol metadata adjusted
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2519 changed several symbols near `.data:0x803BA588` and `.sdata:0x804D37C0` to local scope and added local label `...data.0` at `.data:0x803BA588`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential symbol metadata/path fact; needs curator validation against current symbols and split ownership before becoming source knowledge.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize this PR into a standard that `lbArchive_LoadArchive` should always be manually inlined; the evidence only covers two functions in one PR.
Do not infer reviewer reasoning from the approval, because the review body is empty and there are no inline review comments.
Do not treat the local symbol-scope changes as a broad data-section rule beyond the exact addresses shown without additional map/split evidence.
Do not treat `tmp`, `archive2`, `pad`, or `pad2` as preferred naming style; they appear to be narrow matching locals in this diff.
